items.title: June 19, 2000: Finals MVP Shaquille O'Neal scores 13 of his 41 PTS in the fourth quarter of the Lakers' 116-111 Game 6 win over the Indiana Pacers that clinched the NBA Championship.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 19, 2000: Finals MVP Shaquille O'Neal scores 13 of his 41 PTS in the fourth quarter of the Lakers' 116-111 Game 6 win over the Indiana Pacers that clinched the NBA Championship.

O'Neal, who also had 12 REB/4 BLK in Game 6, averaged 38 PTS/16.7 REB/2.7 BLK in the NBA Finals.

items.title: The Knicks outscored their opponents by 175 points on the road this postseason.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks outscored their opponents by 175 points on the road this postseason. 

+175. 

Yes, that means that thier average margin of victory over all ten road games they played was 17.5 PPG.

17.5 points per game.

AVERAGE margin of victory.

items.title: June 19, 2005: Two big shots by Robert Horry in the last 90 seconds of OT in Game 5 of the Finals give San Antonio a 96-95 win at Detroit—and a 3-2 series lead.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 19, 2005: Two big shots by Robert Horry in the last 90 seconds of OT in Game 5 of the Finals give San Antonio a 96-95 win at Detroit—and a 3-2 series lead.

Horry had 21 PTS/7 REB off the bench and Tim Duncan had 26 PTS/19 REB/2 BLK for the Spurs. The Pistons' Chauncey Billups had 34 PTS/7 AST.

items.title: It's possible the Knicks will benefit from thier own success...
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
It's possible the Knicks will benefit from thier own success...

The NBA salary cap is calculated as a percentage of Basketball Related Income. The league's tax line, and subsequently the Second Apron, are adjusted each season based on the growth of BRI.

items.title: Per the NBA,
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Per the NBA,

The Knicks-Spurs series was the most-watched NBA Finals in 28 years, averaging 20.6 million viewers. 

The Knicks’ series-clinching win in Game 5 averaged 24.5 million viewers and peaked with a whopping 33 million viewers.

items.title: June 19, 1988: Magic Johnson lobs to Byron Scott during Game 6 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 19, 1988: Magic Johnson lobs to Byron Scott during Game 6 of the NBA Finals.

Magic finished with 22 PTS/19 AST, Scott scored 16 PTS and James Worthy had a team-high 28 PTS in the Lakers' 103-102 win that tied the series. Isiah Thomas had 43 PTS/8 AST/6 STL for the Pistons.

items.title: This postseason, Spurs' 22-and-under players have produced 1,325 points. That is the most such points by any team in a single playoff run in NBA history.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
This postseason, Spurs' 22-and-under players have produced 1,325 points. That is the most such points by any team in a single playoff run in NBA history.

2026 Spurs - 1,325 points
2011 Thunder - 1,280
2021 Hawks - 765
2018 Celtics - 679
2007 Cavaliers - 666

(via CrazyStats)
#NBA

items.title: From June 19, 1865 to today — Juneteenth carries the story of freedom realized and still pursued. Ms. Opal Lee helped ensure that story is never forgotten. The NBA Family honors her leadership and the timeless importance of freedom, family, and tradition reflected in this day.
items.author: NBA
